content:
Choosing a health insurance policy is one of the most important financial decisions a family makes. Here is my honest comparison for 2026.

Hospital Network: Star Health has over 14,000 cashless hospitals. HDFC Ergo has approximately 13,000 plus. Both cover major Gorakhpur hospitals including BRD Medical College, Sahara, and Regency. Near-tie in our region.

Star Health Family Health Optima (Rs 5 lakh, family of 4, 35-year-old proposer): Approximately Rs 16,500 to 19,000/year. Features: automatic sum restoration once per year, 10% cumulative bonus per claim-free year, in-house claim settlement team with no TPA.

HDFC Ergo Optima Restore (same profile): Approximately Rs 14,500 to 17,500/year. Key differentiator: the Restore benefit restores the entire base sum insured after the first claim, automatically, even for the same illness. Cumulative bonus: 50% for first claim-free year.

Claim process: Star Health uses an in-house team with no TPA - generally faster. HDFC Ergo uses TPA for some claims, which can slow processing.

My verdict: For most Gorakhpur families, I recommend Star Health for faster claim settlement and slightly better tier-2 city network. However, HDFC Ergo Restore benefit is genuinely excellent for families with a history of recurring illnesses.

Call me at 9415313434 for exact premiums for your family's age profile.

Use our free [Premium Calculator](/calculators/premium) to calculate your own numbers.
contentHi:
Star Health: 14,000+ अस्पताल, in-house क्लेम टीम। Rs 16,500-19,000/वर्ष। ऑटो सम रिस्टोरेशन।

HDFC Ergo Optima Restore: 13,000+ अस्पताल। Rs 14,500-17,500/वर्ष। Restore बेनिफिट - पहले क्लेम के बाद पूरी राशि स्वतः बहाल (उसी बीमारी के लिए भी)।

मेरी राय: अधिकांश गोरखपुर परिवारों के लिए Star Health। बार-बार होने वाली बीमारी के इतिहास वाले परिवारों के लिए HDFC Ergo। 9415313434 पर कॉल करें।
